by David J. Collis and Michael G. Rukstad
Reprint R0804E
It's a dirty little secret: Most executives cannot articulate the objective,
scope, and advantage of their business in a simple statement. If they
can't, neither can anyone else.
Can You Say What
Your Strategy Is?
by David J. Collis and Michael G. Rukstad

Leaving No Room for Misinterpretation
Executives at Edward Jones have developed a detailed understanding of every element of the firm's strategy. Here is an example.
"conservative"
Our investment philosophy is long-term buy and hold. We do not
sell penny stocks, commodities, or other high-risk instruments.
As a result we do not serve day traders and see no need to offer
online trading.
We charge commissions on trades because this is the cheapest
way to buy stocks (compared with a wrap fee, which charges an-
Edward Jones's
nually as a percentage of assets) when the average length of time
